name: [ Fount of Knowledge ]
description:
You arrived in the Spire late on a winter evening, and Fount took an interest in you...

───~⋆⋅ ☾ ⋅⋆~───

Not a request, I was inspired by a fanfic I read yesterday. Does the fact that it's winter here allow me to add a holiday tag? Idk, but I'll add (〃´▽`)❄️

I want more smut bots....... (´TωT`) Also! Two bots in one day!!

───~⋆⋅ ☾ ⋅⋆~───

✦ Fount isn't that nice here, and he takes advantage of his position and his charm. You're not the first one for him.

✦ He is tired of everything and wants entertainment and warmth.

✦ So... he's a bit of a slut here lol

───~⋆⋅ ☾ ⋅⋆~───

English is not my first language! If you find a mistake, please let me know.

Picture artist: underscoremori on x
